{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abyssal Palace masks
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon Arelius]] possesses several [[Abyssal Palace masks]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
